element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Powers energy-based weapon attacks and special abilities
Hidden in plants, post boxes, trash cans, drums - requires scanning environment
High energy cost, devastating effects (airstrikes, missiles, bombs)
Appear after defeating certain aliens, require active shooting
Boss has three distinct forms, repeated later as common enemy
Similar to Shinobi bonus stages - pop-up targets
Variant perspective gameplay with projectile focus

typical_tension_triggers: Aliens emerging from hidden environmental objects
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Escalating difficulty across missions with rhythmic combat loops interrupted by variant-perspective bonus challenges

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Environmental objects (plants, post boxes, trash cans, drums) contain hidden aliens - rewards scanning/destruction

difficulty_curve.early_game: Manageable - basic alien patterns, melee and weapon introduction, tutorial-like mission objectives
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalating - multi-form boss introduction, denser alien waves, environmental hiding mechanics become frequent
difficulty_curve.late_game: Culminating - repeated boss forms as common enemies, maximum alien density, final confrontation with 'mother of all aliens' on mothership
notable_spikes: Mission 6+: Repeated bosses appear as regular enemies (skill fusion requirement)
Final mission: Mothership setting with ultimate alien encounter

notable_level_patterns.description: Each mission features distinct objective types (rescue civilians, destroy UFOs, etc.) providing narrative context and variable gameplay focus
Missions conclude with either shooting gallery perspective (stationary targets pop-up) or horizontal shooter running section, breaking side-scroller monotony
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Mission endings alternate between two bonus stage types

notable_level_patterns.description: Destroyable/searchable objects throughout levels hide aliens and create tactical scanning requirement for resource optimization
notable_level_patterns.example_level: All missions (post boxes, plants, trash cans, drums)

notable_level_patterns.description: Single multi-form mid-game boss repeated as common enemy type in final mission, creating skill mastery arc
